common.forbidden: You don't have permission for that.

login.title: Sign in to Hadir
login.subtitle: Use your Hadir account or your organisation's Microsoft sign-in.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Two-stage workflow · Manager → HR · Admin override per BRD FR-REQ-006. Manager rejection is final unless overridden.

myRequests.title: My requests
myRequests.subtitle: File an exception or leave request — your line manager and HR review them in turn. Manager rejection is final unless an administrator overrides it.

page.subtitle: Recent activity targeted at you. Adjust which categories land here from {{settingsLink}}.

preferences.title: Notifications
preferences.subtitle: Pick which events show up in your bell and which arrive in your inbox. Defaults are both on for every category — flip a checkbox to opt out. Email preferences are honoured the next time the delivery worker runs (within ~30 seconds).

display.pageSub: Adjust how Hadir looks for you. Changes save automatically and follow your account across browsers.
display.themeDescription: System follows your operating-system setting. Light and Dark force a specific palette.
display.densityDescription: Compact tightens row spacing across tables and lists. Comfortable is the default.

pipeline.title: How Hadir works
pipeline.subtitle: From the moment a face crosses the camera to the moment a row lands in your monthly report — here's the path Hadir walks for every employee, every day.

camera.title: Camera
camera.body: RTSP-enabled IP cameras stream video from doorways, lobbies, and entry corridors. Credentials are encrypted at rest and never logged. Operators add cameras through the Cameras page; preview lets them confirm the angle without exposing the password.

capture.title: Capture
capture.body: Hadir reads each enabled camera at four frames per second, runs face detection, and groups frames into tracks with an IoU tracker. One detection event lands in the database per track entry — not per frame — so a person standing in view doesn't flood the log.

detection.title: Detection
detection.body: InsightFace's buffalo_l model bounds the face, scores quality, and produces a 512-dimensional embedding. Crops are saved to disk encrypted with Fernet; embeddings are encrypted on the same row before any DB write.

identification.title: Identification
identification.body: The detection embedding is compared against every enrolled photo per employee. The mean of the top-k angle scores wins, and only matches above the configured threshold are accepted. Below the threshold, the event stays unidentified — the system would rather miss than guess.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.body: A scheduler converts identified events to local time (per tenant timezone) and applies the day's policy to compute in/out, total minutes, late, early-out, short-hours, and overtime. The result is a single row per (employee, date), upserted on every recompute.

policy.title: Policy
policy.body: Policies cascade from Custom range → Ramadan range → employee → department → tenant → legacy fallback. Fixed, Flex, Ramadan, and Custom shapes are all supported, with a single resolved policy applied per employee per date — no stacking.

report.title: Report
report.body: Excel and PDF reports surface the same rows operators see day-to-day, scheduled or on-demand. Schedules drop files via email or a tenant-pinned ERP file-drop. Every report run is audited and accessible only to the roles your BRD says it should be.

apiDocs.title: API Reference
apiDocs.subtitle: Hadir's REST API. The reference below is generated from the same FastAPI handlers that serve every request — it's never out of date.

overview.title: Overview
overview.auth: Authentication uses an HttpOnly session cookie set by POST /api/auth/login. Cookies are SameSite=Lax and refresh sliding-expiry on every authenticated request.
overview.tenant: The hadir_tenant cookie names the tenant schema. Most endpoints require an authenticated session and return 401 without one.
overview.roles: Endpoints are role-scoped. Admin sees everything; HR sees most reads and request workflow; Manager sees their assigned employees and team-level views; Employee sees only their own data.
overview.rateLimits: Login endpoints are rate-limited per (email, IP). Signed report download URLs are rate-limited per IP.

fields.name: Name
fields.hardwareEditHint: Edit on the Worker monitoring page (Operations → Workers).

hints.rtspEdit: Stored value kept as-is unless you type a new URL here.
hints.workerEnabled: When off, this camera stops detecting faces. No attendance impact for absent employees.
hints.displayEnabled: When off, the worker keeps recording but this camera doesn't appear in Live Capture viewer.
hints.detectionEnabled: When off, frames flow to the live preview but the analyzer skips detection — saves CPU when you only want monitoring without face capture.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save camera. Check the RTSP URL and try again.

systemSettings.title: Detection & Tracker
systemSettings.subtitle: System-wide detector + tracker configuration. Changes apply to every camera in this tenant within 10 seconds, no restart required.

detection.title: Detection
detection.subtitle: Backend, input size, confidence thresholds.
detection.resetConfirm: This will revert detection settings to the defaults (InsightFace, 320, score 0.50, min face 60×60).

hint.insightface: Best for offices and clear face views. ~80 ms per analyzer cycle on a typical office laptop.
hint.yolo+face: Detects people first, then faces inside each body box. ~150 ms per analyzer cycle. Use for high-traffic areas.

minDetScore.label: Minimum detection confidence
minDetScore.hint: Below this, detected faces are discarded as false positives.

minFaceSize.label: Minimum face size (pixels per side)
minFaceSize.hint: Faces smaller than this are skipped. 60 = 60×60 pixels (default).

yoloConf.label: YOLO confidence
yoloConf.hint: Person-detection confidence threshold for YOLO+Face mode only.

showBodyBoxes.label: Show body boxes on preview
showBodyBoxes.hint: Debug aid — overlays the YOLO body box alongside the face box on Live Capture.

tracker.title: Tracker
tracker.subtitle: How the IoU tracker stitches detections into tracks. Per-camera Max event duration overrides the value here.
tracker.resetConfirm: This will revert tracker settings to the defaults (IoU 0.30, idle timeout 2.0 s, max event 60 s).

iou.label: IoU threshold
iou.hint: Higher values require more frame-to-frame overlap to keep tracking the same person. Default 0.30 works for typical office cameras.

timeout.label: Track timeout (seconds)
timeout.hint: How long without seeing a face before considering them gone.

maxDuration.label: Max event duration (seconds)
maxDuration.hint: Stop saving new face crops after a person has been in frame this long. Per-camera setting (Cameras → Capture settings) overrides this default.

liveCapture.title: Live capture
liveCapture.subtitle: Real-time face detection
liveCapture.displayDisabledTooltip: Display disabled by Admin — capture worker still recording.
liveCapture.workerDisabledTooltip: Capture worker disabled — no live stream available.
liveCapture.eventsEmpty: Select a camera to see live detections.

calendar.title: Attendance calendar
calendar.pickEmployeeHint: Pick an employee to view their month.
calendar.noTimeline: No detection events recorded for this day.
calendar.noEvidence: No face crops to show — either no detections, or this day was a holiday/leave/weekend.
calendar.companyHint: Click any day to switch to per-person view for {{month}}.

employees.title: Employees
employees.searchPlaceholder: Search by id, name, email, department
employees.empty: No employees match. Try clearing filters or import from Excel.

field.activeHint: Inactive employees still appear in historical reports but are not tracked for new attendance.
field.deactivationReasonLabel: Why is this employee being deactivated?
field.createLogin: Also create a platform login account for this employee

hint.createLogin: When on, the employee gets a login with the chosen roles using the email above. They can sign in immediately with the password you set; deliver it out-of-band.
hint.password: Minimum 12 characters. Stored hashed (Argon2id) — never echoed back.
hint.resetPassword: The new password is copied to your clipboard on apply. Deliver it out-of-band — it's never echoed back later.

login.notLinked: No platform login linked to this employee.
login.notLinkedHint: Use Add Employee → Platform access on creation, or contact your admin to provision a login.

toast.passwordReset: Password reset. Copied to clipboard — deliver out-of-band.

errors.codeAndNameRequired: Employee ID and full name are required.
errors.reasonRequired: A deactivation reason (min 5 chars) is required when status is set to Inactive.
errors.relievingBeforeJoining: Relieving date cannot be before joining date.
errors.overrideCommentMin: Admin override comment must be at least 10 characters.
errors.emailRequiredForLogin: An email is required to create a login account.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
errors.atLeastOneRole: Select at least one role for the new login.

delete.hrBody: Permanently delete {{name}}? This removes their reference photos, attendance, and identity. The action is audited but cannot be reversed.
delete.adminBody: This will create a pending delete request for HR to approve. {{name}} stays in the list with a Pending deletion badge until HR decides.
delete.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this employee being deleted? (min 10 chars)
delete.reasonHint: Recorded in the audit log alongside the actor and timestamp.
delete.reasonMin: Reason must be at least 10 characters.
delete.rejectMin: Comment must be at least 5 characters.
delete.pendingTooltip: A delete request for this employee is awaiting HR approval.
delete.overridePromptComment: Required comment (min 10 chars) — this will be audit-logged with your identity.

formerEmployees.title: Former employees seen
formerEmployees.subtitle: Detections of inactive employees on premises. Security signal — not attendance.
formerEmployees.empty: No former-employee sightings in this range.

workers.title: Worker monitoring
workers.subtitle: Real-time status of capture workers for your tenant
workers.empty: No cameras configured yet. Add a camera to start capturing.

restart.singleBody: Briefly interrupts face capture for this camera (about 5 seconds).
restart.allWarning: This will pause face capture for the entire tenant for approximately 10 seconds while workers reconnect. Anyone walking past a camera during this window will not be recorded for attendance.

errors.title: Recent errors
errors.noneAudit: No audit-log error entries for this camera.
